title: Lesson 36
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: to make the sound of a bell or phone
words.example: The phone will ring when someone calls.

words.meaning: to move quickly from side to side or up and down
words.example: Shake the bottle before you drink it.
Do not shout in the library.

words.meaning: to move over snow using skis
words.example: We ski in the mountains every winter.

words.meaning: to notice something with your nose
words.japaneseMeaning: においがする、においをかぐ
words.example: I can smell fresh bread from the kitchen.

words.meaning: to show happiness with your mouth
words.example: She will smile when she sees the gift.

words.meaning: to say or write the letters of a word in order
words.example: Can you spell your family name?

words.meaning: to take something that belongs to someone else
words.example: It is wrong to steal money from a friend.

words.meaning: to make your body or something else longer or wider
words.example: Stretch your legs after sitting for a long time.
